paragraphs: Good momentum — overdue count is down to 31. Well below the 7-day average of 57 — the team is making real progress. Credit to Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — cleared all overdue.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 18 days past due with 11 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **15 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 30 days past due with 9 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **14 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 18 days past due with 4 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** Down to 3 overdue — making progress. Keep pushing to close them out today. **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **16 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **19 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

144 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **78 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 8 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$32,015 in payments going out this week** across 18 tasks — make sure funds are available. $2,274 expected in from 1 client payment. Heavy week ahead for Ginger Brown and Kyle Aubry - Project 01 — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 7. Keep the momentum going.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 4 overdue (oldest: 18d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 14 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** Down to 3 overdue — good. Close them out today. **6 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 19 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** Clean — 1 tasks in progress. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 16 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.

**Recommendation:** Knock out the 2 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
